mapper.select: SELECT a.*, j.job_name, j.job_code, a.status, CASE WHEN a.status = 0 THEN '待处理' WHEN a.status = 1 THEN '已查看' WHEN a.status = 2 THEN '面试' WHEN a.status = 3 THEN '已录用' ELSE '未知' END AS status_text, a.apply_time, a.id, a.job_seeker_id FROM recruit_application a LEFT JOIN recruit_job j ON a.job_id = j.id WHERE a.job_seeker_id = #{jobSeekerId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
SELECT a.*, j.job_name, j.job_code FROM recruit_application a LEFT JOIN recruit_job j ON a.job_id = j.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruit_application (job_id, job_seeker_id, resume_id, status, cover_letter, self_intro, apply_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{request.jobId}, #{jobSeekerId}, #{request.resumeId}, 0, #{request.coverLetter}, #{request.selfIntro}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
